role: Minister of Commerce (2009–2011); Minister of Industries, Mines and Business (2011–2013); later chairman of National Development Fund
bio: Mehdi Ghazanfari is an Iranian politician and technocrat who served in [Mahmoud Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad)'s second cabinet, first as Minister of Commerce (2009–2011) and then as Minister of Industries, Mines and Business (2011–2013) after a ministry merger. A graduate of the University of New South Wales in Sydney, he later served as chairman of Iran's National Development Fund (NDF). Ghazanfari has [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) ties from earlier in his career.
editorial_notes: UNSW graduate. Commerce Minister 2009-2011, Industries/Mines/Business 2011-2013. Later chaired National Development Fund. IRGC alumnus.
